name: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc.
summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (ICE) is a leading global provider of technology and data to financial institutions, corporations, and government entities. ICE operates regulated exchanges, clearing houses, and data services across three segments: Exchanges (futures, equities, ETFs via NYSE), Fixed Income and Data Services (pricing, indices, CDS clearing, analytics), and Mortgage Technology (digital workflow tools for U.S. residential mortgage lifecycle). Founded in 2000, ICE is a Fortune 500 company operating 13 regulated exchanges and six clearing houses globally.

products.name: Brent Crude Oil Futures
products.description: Flagship energy futures contract serving as cornerstone of a global oil network with over 800 related crude and refined oil products.

products.name: ICE Bonds
products.description: Electronic fixed income trading platform supporting click-to-trade, RFQ, and auction protocols including portfolio auctions.

products.name: ICE Clear Credit
products.description: CDS clearing house supporting over 700 Single Name CDS reference entities and over 180 Index CDS instruments.

products.name: ICE Clear Europe
products.description: Clearing house for energy, agricultural, interest rates and equity index futures and options contracts based in the U.K.

products.name: ICE Global Network
products.description: Multi-asset class connectivity solution offering secure, low-latency data delivery across asset classes.

products.name: ICE Data Indices
products.description: Fixed income index complex built on evaluated pricing and reference data covering millions of financial instruments.

products.name: NYSE
products.description: Hybrid market combining technology and human judgment for equities, ETFs and options; hosts ~70% of S&P 500 companies.

products.name: Mortgage Technology Platform
products.description: Digital workflow tools covering U.S. residential mortgage lifecycle from application through closing, servicing and secondary market.

products.name: Fixed Income Evaluated Pricing
products.description: End-of-day and continuous pricing on over three million fixed income securities across ~150 countries and 80 currencies.

products.name: Environmental Markets
products.description: Futures and options for carbon cap-and-trade, renewable fuel standards, and climate-related risk management products.

products.name: NYSE FAANG+ Index
products.description: Equity index product offered as part of ICE's financial futures and options suite.

products.name: ETF Hub
products.description: Workflow solution within fixed income and data analytics offerings supporting ETF-related operations.

partnerships.description: ICE offers equity futures and options contracts based on MSCI indices including Emerging Market and ESG indices.
ICE offers equity futures and options contracts based on FTSE indices.
Provides default insurance backing a $200 million letter of credit for ICE NGX's $215 million guaranty fund.
